name: DANEVILLE PIZZA PUB AND GRILL LLC

violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walk in cooler floor is in need of cleaning. -Dry storage area has a big sticky spot on the floor in need of cleaning--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles above the dough preparation area are missing.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents or other pests were not removed at a frequency to prevent accumulation, decomposition or their attraction of additional pests. -Dead vermin was found on premise and removed.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Door of walk in cooler is not able to seal when closed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ice machine should be cleaned frequently to prevent build up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Specifically, floor in prep area and floor mats in the walk in cooler not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
